examples: An agency with a frozen budget regards it as a cutback, because certain expenses rise, such as payroll.
When they tried to trap him, he slithered through it like Barry Sanders, making a cutback to get space.
Tell your friends that you've been advised to cutback on alcohol because of a condition like gastric ulcer or a liver disease.
These usually schedule a 20% cutback around 2020, 40% by 2030, and 80% by 2050.
Inventories, which were temporarily in surplus, have tightened due to an OPEC production cutback.
